entry.title: Apple's AI Strategy in a Nutshell
entry.quote: Apple clearly knows its stuff when comes to AI - contrary to what many doubters proclaimed. They just announced the best on-device model in the market, as well as its own data center - that Apple built from ground up - that can run Apple scale inference with its own chips. Apple is already a vertically integrated AI company, and deserve a higher valuation.

entry.title: Iceberger
entry.quote: Draw an iceberg and see how it will float.

entry.title: Spreadsheet Superstars
entry.quote: An elite handful of analysts, actuaries, and accountants have mastered Excel, arguably the most important software in the business world. So what do they do in Vegas? They open a spreadsheet.

entry.title: Microsoft to delay release of Recall AI feature on security concerns
entry.quote: The decision is "rooted in our commitment to providing a trusted, secure and robust experience for all customers and to seek additional feedback prior to making the feature available to all Copilot+ PC users," the Redmond, Washington-based company said.

entry.title: Voyager 1 Returning Science Data From All Four Instruments
entry.quote: On May 19, the mission team executed the second step of that repair process and beamed a command to the spacecraft to begin returning science data.
